channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Security Deployed at INEC Headquarters in Abuja Amid ADC Leadership Dispute
item.description: For Thursday, Abuja don see heavy security as soldiers and police with armoured tanks dey guard the headquarters of Independent National Electoral Commission (INEC). This na because members of the Afr...

item.title: TRA and Fuel Operators to Enhance 24-Hour Depot Operations for Steady Supply
item.description: The Tanzania Revenue Authority (TRA) has encouraged fuel depot operators across the country to strengthen their cooperation with the authority in running depots around the clock. This initiative aims ...

item.title: Market(In)Sights 2026: Insights on Building Relevant Brands for Filipino Consumers
item.description: Market(In)Sights 2026 is a one-day event scheduled on April 24, 2026, at the Sarus A Ballroom, Marquis Events Place, focusing on how brands can stay relevant in the ever-changing Filipino market. This...

item.title: Delhi High Court orders restoration of satirical X accounts but keeps alleged objectionable posts blocked
item.description: The Delhi High Court has directed social media platform X (formerly Twitter) to restore access in India to two satirical accounts, @DrNimoYadav and @Nehr_who, which were blocked on 18 March following ...

item.title: South Korean Intelligence Suggests Kim Jong Un’s Daughter May Succeed Him
item.description: South Korea’s National Intelligence Service (NIS) has reportedly gathered credible intelligence suggesting that Kim Jong Un’s teenage daughter, believed to be around 13 years old and named Ju Ae, is b...

item.title: Pepsi and Diageo Withdraw Sponsorship from Wireless Festival Over Kanye West Headline Booking Amid Antisemitism Backlash
item.description: Na recent development wey dey shake the music industry, two big drinks companies, Pepsi and Diageo, don pull out from sponsoring the 2026 Wireless Festival for London because of the announcement say K...

item.title: Teenage boy dies in KwaMashu crash while driving father allegedly under the influence
item.description: A tragic accident took place in KwaMashu, KwaZulu-Natal, on Sunday when a 14-year-old boy lost his life after overturning his father's car several times on the M25 highway. According to Reaction Unit ...

item.title: Iran pledges large‑scale retaliation if U.S. strikes civilian infrastructure
item.description: Iran’s military has warned that it would launch a more extensive and destructive offensive if the United States carries out attacks on Iranian civilian infrastructure, according to Iranian state media...

item.title: Police Arrest Young Man In Kwara Over Alleged Links To ISWAP
item.description: The Kwara State Police Command don confirm say dem don arrest one 20-year-old man wey dem call Mallami Abubakar because e get alleged connection with some terrorist groups wey dey operate for Nigeria....

item.title: Wests Tigers secure golden point win amid Easter Monday offside and sin bin incidents
item.description: The Wests Tigers have secured a dramatic golden point victory in their Easter Monday NRL clash, following a match filled with controversy. Key moments included a player being sent to the sin bin and a...

item.title: Malaysia Airlines to Add More China Routes Amid Fuel and Conflict Challenges
item.description: Amid rising tensions from the ongoing Middle East conflict, Malaysia Airlines is capitalizing on the situation by expanding its network. The flag carrier has announced new routes connecting Kuala Lump...

item.title: Kuhu's Journey of Reconnecting with Her Mother
item.description: The excerpt from 'Kuhu Learns to Deal With Life' by Sonia Dogra tells the story of Kuhu, a young girl who is navigating her way through school, family dynamics, and the absence of her mother. Despite ...

item.title: Gold and silver rally signals declining trust in global financial system amid uncertainty
item.description: Gold and silver prices are surging not merely as a reaction to fear from inflation, geopolitical tensions or interest rate shifts, but as a deeper indicator of doubt in the durability, neutrality and ...

item.title: Seun Okinbaloye Says He Is Not Intimidated by Wike’s Comment on Shooting Him
item.description: Channels Television anchor, Seun Okinbaloye, don talk say him no dey afraid and him no go allow anybody intimidate am after FCT Minister Nyesom Wike talk say him get urge to shoot the popular journali...

item.title: Victoria's First Public Skate Park in Geelong Receives Heritage Protection
item.description: The City of Greater Geelong has proposed heritage protection for Corio Bowls, the state's first purpose-built public skate park. Established in 1980 by local youth, the park became a hub for skateboar...

item.title: Johannesburg man drowns in Gonubie River despite teenager's heroic rescue attempts
item.description: A tragic drowning occurred on Sunday afternoon when a 30-year-old man from Johannesburg lost his life while swimming in the Gonubie River. The man had been with two colleagues from work, who were also...

item.title: Trump Endorses Steve Hilton for California Governor, Boosting Republican Chances in Crowded Primary
item.description: President Donald Trump has officially endorsed Republican candidate Steve Hilton in the 2026 California gubernatorial race, a move that could significantly influence the outcome of the June primary. I...

item.title: Ontario backs federal petition calling for independent review of military honours and posthumous Victoria Cross for Pte. Jess Larochelle
item.description: A House of Commons petition sponsored by Nipissing-Timiskaming MP Pauline Rochefort has gained support from the Ontario provincial government. The petition urges the federal government to create an in...

item.title: Karachi to experience partly cloudy weather with possible light to moderate rainfall today
item.description: Karachi is expected to have partly cloudy weather today with chances of light to moderate rain or thunderstorms, according to the Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD). A westerly wave is affecting...

item.title: Tanzania Calls for Unified African Strategy on Self-Reliance Amid Global Crises
item.description: Finance Minister Ambassador Khamis Mussa Omar has called on African nations to come together and build strong, self-reliant economies that can stand firm during global crises and conflicts. Speaking a...
